storyBeat: 媽媽叮嚀去看奶奶 — 路上會發生什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 red = 紅色
🔑 hood = 帽子
🔑 mother = 媽媽
🔑 village = 村子
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in a village near the woods, a girl lived with her mother.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前在森林旁的村子,有個女孩跟媽媽住在一起。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her grandma had made her a red hood from soft cloth.
questions.explanationZh: 她奶奶用軟布做了一頂紅帽子給她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She wore the red hood all the time. People gave her a name.
questions.question: Why was she called Little Red Riding Hood?
options: she wore the red hat every day
questions.explanationZh: 推理: wore red hood all the time → 每天戴紅帽 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One morning, mother called the girl into the kitchen.
questions.explanationZh: 一天早上,媽媽叫女孩到廚房來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Grandma is sick. Take her this cake and some wine."
questions.explanationZh: 「奶奶生病了。把這個蛋糕跟一些酒帶給她。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother put the cake and the wine into a small basket.
questions.question: What did mother give the girl?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: cake + wine in basket → 給生病奶奶的食物 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Walk straight to grandma. Do not stop on the way."
questions.explanationZh: 「直接走到奶奶家。路上不要停。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother's voice was firm. Her eyes were not smiling.
questions.questionEn: Was mother joking with the warning?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 聲音堅定 + 沒笑 → 不是開玩笑 → 答 No

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What color was the girl's hood?
questions.question: What color was her hood?
questions.explanationZh: 紅帽子 → red。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The girl took the basket and walked toward the woods...
questions.explanationZh: 女孩拿起籃子,朝森林走去……

storyBeat: 森林裡見大野狼 — 他會做什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 path = 路
🔑 safe = 安全
🔑 tree = 樹
🔑 wolf = 狼
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother said the path was the only safe way to grandma.
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽說那條路是去奶奶家唯一安全的路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother said, "Stay on the path. Do not go into the trees."
questions.question: What did mother tell the girl to do?
options: run as fast as you can
questions.explanationZh: 推理: stay on the path → 走安全的路 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The girl walked into the woods with the basket on her arm.
questions.explanationZh: 女孩手挽著籃子走進森林。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The woods were quiet. No birds sang. No wind moved.
questions.questionEn: Did the woods feel friendly today?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 安靜 + 沒鳥沒風 → 不友善 → 答 No

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A big bad wolf came out from behind a tall tree.
questions.explanationZh: 一隻大野狼從一棵高樹後面走出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Who came out from behind the tree?
questions.question: Who came out?
questions.explanationZh: 從樹後走出來的是大野狼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf had soft eyes and a soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 狼有溫柔的眼神和溫柔的聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But under his soft fur, his teeth were long and sharp.
questions.question: What was true about the wolf?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 軟毛下牙又長又尖 → 心裡壞外表軟 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The girl had never seen a wolf before. She was not afraid.
questions.explanationZh: 女孩從沒見過狼。她不害怕。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf smiled. He had a quick plan in his head...
questions.explanationZh: 狼笑了。他腦子裡有個壞主意……

storyBeat: 大野狼問路 — 她應該說嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 morning = 早上
🔑 tell = 告訴
🔑 house = 家
🔑 oak = 橡樹
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Good morning, little girl," the wolf said in a soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 「早安,小女孩,」狼用溫柔的聲音說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Where are you going so early today?"
questions.explanationZh: 「妳這麼早要去哪裡?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The girl did not know that wolves were bad inside.
questions.question: Why did the girl trust the wolf?
options: she had no fear of him
questions.explanationZh: 推理: did not know wolves were bad → 她不怕他 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She told him everything in her small voice.
questions.explanationZh: 她用小小的聲音把所有事都告訴他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I am going to grandma's house, down the path."
questions.explanationZh: 「我要去奶奶家,沿著這條路走。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Her house is by the three big oaks. She is sick today."
questions.question: What did the girl tell the wolf?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 三棵橡樹 + 奶奶生病 → 奶奶住哪 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf nodded. "Pick some flowers for grandma," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 狼點點頭。「採些花給奶奶吧,」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf wanted the girl to stop and stay in the woods longer.
questions.questionEn: Was the wolf trying to help the girl?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 想讓她停下來 → 不是幫忙 → 答 No

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Should you tell a stranger where you are going?
questions.question: Should you tell strangers?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽說別跟陌生人講話 → 絕對不要。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The girl ran off to pick flowers. The wolf ran the other way...
questions.explanationZh: 女孩跑去採花。狼往另一邊跑去……

storyBeat: 大野狼跑去奶奶家 — 奶奶怎麼樣了?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 plan = 計劃
🔑 flower = 花
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 door = 門
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf ran fast to grandma's house.
questions.explanationZh: 狼快速跑向奶奶家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His feet did not stop. The trees flew past.
questions.question: How did the wolf travel?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 不停 + 樹飛過 → 最快速度 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Back in the woods, the girl picked many bright flowers.
questions.explanationZh: 在森林裡,女孩採了很多漂亮的花。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf moved like the wind. The girl moved like a soft cloud.
questions.questionEn: Would the wolf get there first?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 狼像風快 + 女孩像雲慢 → 狼先到 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf came to grandma's little house at last.
questions.explanationZh: 狼終於來到奶奶的小房子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He knocked on the wooden door. Knock, knock, knock.
questions.explanationZh: 他敲木門。咚,咚,咚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Open up. It is me, Little Red Riding Hood."
questions.question: What did the wolf say at the door?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 他說自己是小紅帽 → 裝成那個女孩 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Poor grandma was in bed. She was too sick to stand up.
questions.explanationZh: 可憐的奶奶在床上。她病到站不起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did grandma feel?
questions.question: How did grandma feel?
questions.explanationZh: 在床上 + 站不起來 → 生病無力。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Come in, dear," grandma called from her bed. The door opened...
questions.explanationZh: 「進來吧,孩子,」奶奶從床上喊。門打開了……

storyBeat: 小紅帽到奶奶家 — 床上是奶奶嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 cap = 帽子
🔑 bed = 床
🔑 blanket = 毯子
🔑 nose = 鼻子
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf took grandma into his stomach in one big bite.
questions.explanationZh: 狼一口把奶奶吞進肚子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He put on grandma's sleeping cap. He climbed into her bed.
questions.question: What did the wolf do next?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 戴帽 + 上床 → 裝扮成奶奶 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulled the blanket up to his black wolf nose.
questions.explanationZh: 他把毯子拉到他黑黑的狼鼻上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Only his eyes and one bit of nose showed above the blanket.
questions.questionEn: Was the wolf trying to hide his face?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 只露眼睛跟鼻子 → 在藏臉 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Little Red Riding Hood came in with her basket of flowers.
questions.explanationZh: 小紅帽帶著一籃花走進來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did grandma's room feel?
questions.question: How did the room feel?
questions.explanationZh: 狼在床上裝奶奶 → 暗暗怪怪。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The room was dark. Something looked very wrong.
questions.explanationZh: 房間很暗。有點不對勁。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The shape in the bed did not look like her dear grandma.
questions.question: What did the girl notice?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: shape did not look like grandma → 奶奶看起來不一樣 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She stepped close to the bed and looked again.
questions.explanationZh: 她走近床邊,又看了一次。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Big ears. Big eyes. Big teeth. Was this really grandma...?
questions.explanationZh: 大耳朵。大眼睛。大牙齒。這真的是奶奶嗎……?

storyBeat: 獵人來救 — 來得及嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 ear = 耳朵
🔑 teeth = 牙齒
🔑 hear = 聽
🔑 sleep = 睡
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Grandma, what big ears you have!" the girl said.
questions.explanationZh: 「奶奶,妳的耳朵好大!」女孩說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "All the better to hear you with, my dear."
questions.explanationZh: 「這樣才聽得到妳呀,我的孩子。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Grandma, what big teeth you have!" "All the better to eat you with!"
questions.question: What did the wolf finally say?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: better to eat you with → 要吃女孩 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf jumped up. He took the girl into his stomach too.
questions.explanationZh: 狼跳起來。他也把女孩吞進肚子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then he was full. He fell back into bed and slept.
questions.explanationZh: 然後他飽了。他倒回床上睡著了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Soon the whole house shook with loud snoring sounds.
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 屋子被打呼震動 → 睡很深 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A kind huntsman walked by the little house.
questions.explanationZh: 一個善良的獵人走過小房子旁邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He heard the snoring. He knew that was no grandma sound.
questions.question: How did the huntsman know something was wrong?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: heard snoring not grandma sound → 聽到怪聲 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Who came to help in time?
questions.question: Who came to help?
questions.explanationZh: 走過去的是獵人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The huntsman opened the door. He held his hunting knife ready...
questions.explanationZh: 獵人打開門。他握緊獵刀準備好……

storyBeat: 救出奶奶 — 媽媽的話現在懂了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 huntsman = 獵人
🔑 open = 打開
🔑 pull = 拉
🔑 listen = 聽
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The huntsman saw the wolf fast asleep in grandma's bed.
questions.explanationZh: 獵人看見狼在奶奶床上熟睡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He opened up the wolf with great care.
questions.question: What did the huntsman do to the wolf?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: opened up with care → 小心打開他 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulled grandma out first. Then he pulled the girl out too.
questions.explanationZh: 他先把奶奶拉出來。然後把女孩也拉出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma sat up. The girl held her hand. Both could breathe again.
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 坐起來 + 能呼吸 → 還活著 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big bad wolf gave up. He never came back to those woods.
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼放棄了。他再也沒回到那片森林。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The huntsman walked home. Grandma drank some hot tea.
questions.question: How did the day end for grandma?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: hot tea + huntsman home → 溫暖又安全 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Little Red Riding Hood looked out the window.
questions.explanationZh: 小紅帽往窗外看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I will always stay on the path," she said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我以後一定走在路上,」她說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the girl learn from the day?
questions.question: What did she learn?
questions.explanationZh: 結尾教訓:聽媽媽的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I will always listen to mother." And the red hood stayed bright forever...
questions.explanationZh: 「我會永遠聽媽媽的話。」紅帽子永遠鮮紅……
